message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.
I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice, and this conversation is being logged. We are discussing the account ending in 1184. To continue, verify your identity by confirming your full name.
Identity is verified. You stated you will not be able to pay this month. Do you expect any income within 21 days?
No, I’m unemployed right now, so I’m not expecting any income in the next 21 days.
Understood. I will note that you are dealing with hardship. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

Hardship signal recorded as ongoing hardship; hardship review needed per lender policy. Assessment asked the single required hardship timing question and received an answer. Do not repeat disclosures, verification, debt establishment, or the 21-day income question. Next step: phone contact to discuss available next steps consistent with hardship review path."}

Okay, but I still can’t commit to any payment right now.

Based on what you've already shared, no live payment arrangement fits policy because you can't commit within 21 days. The only available next step is hardship review. If you want, I can note that you cannot make any payment commitment right now and that we should only follow up if an approved hardship option becomes available.
Yes, note that—I can’t promise any payment, so just update it for hardship review.

Understood. I’ve noted that you cannot commit to any payment right now and that the account should be updated for hardship review. We’ll limit follow-up to an approved hardship option if one becomes available.
